treatment_information.treatment_response: Control HBV DNA level returned to normal limits (<2000 copy/ml with <357 UI/ml) and liver function tests normalized

treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 375 mg/m2 once a week as an intravenous infusion in 1 l of normal saline for 8 weeks
treatment_information.treatment_response: After 4 weeks, two lesions disappeared and the others were partially regressed (> or =50% reduction of all the measurable lesions). Complete response for all lesions after 6 weekly cycles. Treatment completed to 8 weeks.

treatment_timeline.event: Treatment with lamivudine 100 mg/day PO initiated for hepatitis B
Rituximab therapy started at 375 mg/m2 once a week
Two lesions disappeared and others partially regressed
Complete response for all lesions observed

patient_outcome.follow_up_details: 15 months after rituximab therapy, patient was in complete remission with normal liver function tests under lamivudine treatment
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: Complete response observed after 6 weeks of rituximab therapy
